name: Three-Act Structure
description: The foundational story structure: setup, confrontation, and resolution. The backbone of most Western storytelling from Aristotle to Hollywood.

children.title: Hook
children.synopsis: Grab the reader's attention and establish tone.

scenes.title: Hook
scenes.synopsis: Open with an engaging moment that draws the audience in.

children.title: Exposition
children.synopsis: Introduce the protagonist, their world, and what's at stake.

scenes.title: Exposition
scenes.synopsis: Establish the protagonist's ordinary world and relationships.

children.title: Inciting Incident
children.synopsis: An event disrupts the status quo and sets the story in motion.

scenes.title: Inciting Incident
scenes.synopsis: The event that changes everything and launches the central conflict.

children.title: First Plot Point
children.synopsis: The protagonist commits to addressing the central conflict.

scenes.title: First Plot Point
scenes.synopsis: The point of no return — the hero enters the new world.

children.title: Rising Action
children.synopsis: The protagonist faces escalating obstacles and complications.

scenes.title: Rising Action
scenes.synopsis: Challenges grow more difficult. The hero learns and adapts.

children.title: Midpoint
children.synopsis: A major reversal or revelation that shifts the story's direction.

scenes.title: Midpoint
scenes.synopsis: A turning point that raises stakes and changes the hero's approach.

children.title: Complications
children.synopsis: Things get worse. Subplots converge and pressure builds.

scenes.title: Complications
scenes.synopsis: The antagonist gains ground. Allies may falter.

children.title: Second Plot Point
children.synopsis: The final piece of information or event that pushes toward the climax.

scenes.title: Second Plot Point
scenes.synopsis: The hero gets what they need for the final confrontation.

children.title: Climax
children.synopsis: The protagonist faces the central conflict head-on.

scenes.title: Climax
scenes.synopsis: The decisive confrontation where everything comes to a head.

children.title: Falling Action
children.synopsis: The aftermath of the climax; loose ends begin to resolve.

children.title: Denouement
children.synopsis: The new normal is established. The story reaches its final state.

scenes.title: Denouement
scenes.synopsis: Show the transformed world and the hero's new equilibrium.
